channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Detroit Lions offensive coordinator Ben Johnson to become head coach of Bears, per report
item.description: Detroit Lions offensive coordinator Ben Johnson is leaving to become the head coach of the Chicago Bears, according to reports.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: Winter storm forces Houston basketball to postpone men's game, alter women's schedule
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — No. 7 Houston's game against Utah scheduled for Tuesday night has been pushed back to Wednesday because of severe weather forecast for the Houston area. The Cougars, who have won 10 games in a row, will face Utah at 5 p.m. CST Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Auburn a unanimous No. 1, Duke now No. 2; Michigan St into top 10, Louisville ends AP Top 25 drought
item.description: A wild week of upsets and court stormings led to a massive shakeup in the AP Top 25. One constant: Auburn. The Tigers were the unanimous pick at No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The 1 play that turned tide against Detroit Lions in playoff loss, according to Dan Campbell
item.description: There was one play in particular that turned the tide against the Detroit Lions in their playoff loss to the Commanders, according to Dan Campbell.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: National championship game on tap as Notre Dame and Ohio State close a long, strange football season
item.description: The curtain comes down Monday night on the longest, strangest college football season anyone has ever seen.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: There's a race this weekend, so Justin Marks made sure Trackhouse Racing had entry in the field
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Justin Marks had grandiose ideas when he bought Chip Ganassi Racing ahead of the 2022 NASCAR season. The former driver is probably the most forward-thinking team owner in NASCAR and in three seasons is making his mark all over motorsports.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hail to the Chiefs? The most despised team in the Bay Area nears another Super Bowl
item.description: It's up to Buffalo, Philadelphia or Washington to halt the Chiefs in their drive to win three straight Super Bowls.
item.dc:creator: Jerry McDonald, The Mercury News

item.title: CMU Softball ready to chase another dominant season in 2025
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— After a record-breaking 2024 campaign that ended in postseason disappointment, the Colorado Mesa University softball team is gearing up for another dominant season.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Former MLB catcher, AL manager of the year for the White Sox dies at 83
item.description: Jeff Torborg, a former MLB catcher and manager of the Chicago White Sox, died this morning in Westfield, New Jersey, after a career that included a World Series championship and a Manager of the Year award.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Auburn's Bruce Pearl slams Hamas terrorists after 3 Israeli hostages are released
item.description: Auburn Tigers men's basketball head coach Bruce Pearl slams Hamas terrorists as a video showed their reaction to freeing three Israeli hostages.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Massive run plays power Eagles to NFC Championsip Game
item.description: These Philly Snow Birds had cause for celebration -- they will host the NFC championship game Sunday against Washington, after the Commanders upset No. 1 seed Detroit on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Comeback attempt falls short, Rams lose to Eagles in NFL Divisional Round
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Saquon Barkley dashed through the snow for touchdown runs of 78 and 62 yards and finished with 205 yards rushing, Jalen Hurts had a 44-yard scoring run and the Philadelphia Eagles held on against the turnover-happy Los Angeles Rams 28-22 on Sunday to advance to the NFC championsh
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Mahomes and Kelce help Chiefs to a 23-14 win over Texans and another AFC title game trip
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Patrick Mahomes has never lost in the divisional round of the playoffs with the Kansas City Chiefs. The Houston Texans still have never won.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC players react to first week of practice
item.description: The "Chrome & Azul" are back on the training ground to finish off their first week of training, for the first time ever as a club.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Ball and Bridges lead Hornets to wild 125-123 win over Bulls
item.description: LaMelo Ball scored 26 points, Miles Bridges had 21 and the Charlotte Hornets held on for a wild 125-123 win over the Chicago Bulls on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Sammy Sosa gets warm reception for his reconciliation with the Chicago Cubs
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Sammy Sosa jogged onto the stage, carrying an American flag. The crowd cheered wildly. It was just like old times — only Sosa was dressed in a suit, and the scene occurred in a downtown hotel ballroom instead of Wrigley Field.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah Valley wins on overtime buzzer-beater, 85-83
item.description: ARLINGTON, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - Texas native Kylin Green went the full length of the floor in five seconds and dished to Jackson Holcombe, who scored in the final second of overtime to lift Utah Valley to a thrilling 85-83 road victory over UT Arlington on Thursday night at College Park Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah's struggles at home continue with 5-3 loss to Rangers
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club are having a difficult time during its longest homestand of the season. The New York Rangers scored three goals in the third period to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 5-3 at Delta Center on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC's youngest player having big impact
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Logan Cooley may only be 20 years old, but it is scary to think where the Utah Hockey Club would be without him this year. Cooley can't even drink legally, and he is second on the team in points with 12 goals and 25 assists.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Plateau Valley’s Jack Vig Joins Elite Club with 1,000-Point Milestone
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— Plateau Valley High School senior Jack Vig recently reached a milestone few high school basketball players achieve — a 1,000-point career “It just felt like another two points for my career. It wasn’t a big deal for me.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: State Farm pulls Super Bowl commercial, shifts focus to supporting L.A. wildfire victims
item.description: State Farm has decided to pull its Super Bowl commercial and instead focus on supporting Los Angeles residents impacted by the deadly wildfires. “Our focus is firmly on providing support to the people of Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Utah Royals have busy offseason with massive roster overhaul
item.description: The Utah Royals have had a busy offseason. There have been departures and additions galore, as the team continues to try to improve before the 2025 NWSL season with the goal of making playoffs for the first time.
item.dc:creator: Stockton Mair, ABC 4

item.title: Aggies six-game winning streak ends at UNLV, 65-62
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State basketball team suffered just its second loss of the season Wednesday night, falling at UNLV, 65-62. Tucker Anderson led the Aggies with 19 points, but the Aggies missed its last six shots of the game, and dropped to 16-2 on the season. Dedan Thomas Jr.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Basketball: Mission Hills 73, Rancho Bernardo 33
item.description: Mission Hills known to be one of the top teams to beat in the county, and they proved to be so with a dominant 73-33 win over Rancho Bernardo.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: White Sox announce 16 signings in 2025 international class
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have agreed to terms with 16 international players, including two ranked in the Top 100 available prospects, Alejandro Cruz and Orlando Patiño, and other prospects with potential.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: SuperMotocross World Championship comes to San Diego: What to know
item.description: Snapdragon Stadium will host the Monster Energy AMA Supercross Championship on Saturday, continuing the legacy of off-road motorsports in San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Montreal skates past Utah Hockey Club, 5-3
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club's season-long 7-game homestand is not going well. Utah lose for the third time in four games at the Delta Center, falling to the Montreal Canadians Tuesday night, 5-3.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bruins open 4-goal lead, add 2 short-handed empty-netters to beat Lightning 6-2
item.description: David Pastrnak had a goal and two assists and Parker Wotherspoon scored his first NHL goal on Tuesday night to help the Boston Bruins open a four-goal lead and hold on to beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 6-2.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Sammy Sosa to attend 2025 Cubs Convention, team announces
item.description: Former Chicago Cub and fan favorite Sammy Sosa will attend the 2025 Cubs Convention, the team announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Former Padres Peavy, Gonzalez headline 77th Salute to the Champions
item.description: The Padres duo, along with WNBA star Charde Houston, now have a permanent place inside the Western Metal Supply Company building at Petco Park as Breitbard Hall of Famers.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Mike McCarthy won't return as the Cowboys' coach. Deion Sanders could be a candidate to replace him
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Mike McCarthy will not return as coach of the Dallas Cowboys, who are going on three decades since their last Super Bowl title, owner Jerry Jones said Monday. Jones said the organization and McCarthy mutually agreed to part ways.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Rams host wild-card playoff game nearly 400 miles east of LA because of wildfires
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — The Los Angeles Rams made themselves at home on Monday night for their NFL wild-card playoff game against the Minnesota Vikings — even if their adopted stadium featured an unusual amount of red and was nearly 400 miles east of their regular venue.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, NewsNation
